body_text:
20:08 â March 31, 2020
Update to the Wires Part
We added procedures on editing outgoing wires to the Wires Part. This function allows authorized users to edit unapproved wires if an error is detected. We also made other changes as described below.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.2, Contacts, Websites, and other Resources
We replaced references to the Financial Institutions Commission (FICOM) with BC Financial Services Authority (BCFSA). We also replaced references to Financial Services Commission of Ontario (FSCO) with Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA).
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added definitions for BCFSA and FSRA.
Section 10.1, Overview of Wires Lists
We provided more detailed descriptions of the four wires lists: Pending Incoming, Pending Outgoing, Submitted Wires, and Received Wires.
Section 10.2, Viewing a Wires List
We added clarity to the procedure for viewing a wires list.
Section 10.3, Viewing Wire Details
We added clarity to the procedure for viewing the wire details.
Chapter 11, Editing an Outgoing Wire
This new Chapter describes how to edit an outgoing wire and provides relevant rules and restrictions.
Section 16.2, Receiving Incoming Wires
We added clarity to the procedure for receiving incoming wires.
Questions
